QUICKLINKS.TITLE: Links
QUICKLINKS.LABEL: Label
QUICKLINKS.VALIDATION_LABEL_TOO_LONG: The label must not be longer than 100 characters.
QUICKLINKS.VALIDATION_LABEL_NO_QUOTES: The label must not contain quotation marks.
QUICKLINKS.VALIDATION_URL_TOO_LONG: The URL must not be longer than 300 characters.

LANDING.H1:
Share ideas.
Find teams.
Bring projects to life.
LANDING.P: Connect with creative minds and turn ideas into successful collaborations.
LANDING.BUTTON: Log in now to discover projects, edit your profile, and share your own ideas.

AUTH.P2: What are your plans for today? Create your first project, discover exciting ideas, or connect with other creative minds. Your adventure starts here!

MYPROJECTS.TITLE: My projects
MYPROJECTS.EMPTY_DESCRIPTION: Once you create your first project, it will appear here.
MYPROJECTS.ERROR_LOAD_USERNAME: Your username could not be loaded.
MYPROJECTS.ERROR_LOAD_PROJECTS: Your projects could not be loaded.

USERPROFILE.ERROR_AUTH_REQUIRED: Please log in to view this profile.
USERPROFILE.ERROR_LOAD_PROFILE: Profile information could not be loaded. Please try again later.
USERPROFILE.ERROR_EDIT_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to edit this profile.
USERPROFILE.ERROR_UPDATE_PROFILE: The profile could not be updated. Please try again later.

CONTACT-REQUESTS.CONTACT-PROJECT: Manage contact requests for my project

FAVORITE.TITLE: My Favorites
FAVORITE.EMPTY_DESCRIPTION: Once you favorite a project, it will appear here.
FAVORITE.ERROR_LOAD: Your favorites could not be loaded.

MODERATOR.TITLE: Moderator Area
MODERATOR.DESCRIPTION: Welcome to the moderator area. Users and projects can be managed here in the future.
MODERATOR.PROJECTS_LINK_DESCRIPTION: View, search, and delete all projects.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Project Management
PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: View, search, and delete projects as needed.
PROJECTS.CONFIRM_DELETE_TEXT: The project "{{ projectName }}" will be permanently deleted. All associated data will be lost.
PROJECTS.CONFIRM_DELETE_LABEL: Type the project name to confirm
PROJECTS.CONFIRM_DELETE_PLACEHOLDER: Type the project name to confirm
PROJECTS.CONFIRM_DELETE_HINT_FILLED: The project name must be entered

USER_MANAGEMENT.TITLE: User Management
USER_MANAGEMENT.DESCRIPTION: View and manage all registered users.
USER_MANAGEMENT.EMPTY_BANNED_DESCRIPTION: Banned users appear here and can no longer access the platform.
USER_MANAGEMENT.EMPTY_ACTIVE_DESCRIPTION: Active users appear here and can be banned if necessary.

MODAL.TITLE: Ban user
MODAL.DESCRIPTION: The user will be blocked and can no longer use the platform. The account remains in the system.
MODAL.REASON_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. violation of terms of use...

PROJECTCREATE.SHORT_DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: Describe your project in one or two sentences
PROJECTCREATE.PROJECT_URL_LABEL: Project URL (Your project will be available at /project/your-input)
PROJECTCREATE.PROJECT_URL_EXISTS: This project URL is already taken.
PROJECTCREATE.PRIVATE_DESCRIPTION: Only invited users will be able to see the project
PROJECTCREATE.FINISH_DESCRIPTION: Review all entries to complete your project.
PROJECTCREATE.PROJECT_URL_CHECK_ERROR: Project URL could not be checked.
PROJECTCREATE.SUCCESS_CREATED_WITH_INVITES: Project created successfully and invitations sent!
PROJECTCREATE.ERROR_CREATE_PROJECT: Project could not be created. Please try again.

VALIDATION.NAME_MIN: Project name must be at least 3 characters long.
VALIDATION.NAME_MAX: Project name must not be longer than 20 characters.
VALIDATION.NAME_NO_QUOTES: Project name must not contain quotation marks.
VALIDATION.SHORT_DESCRIPTION_MAX: Short description must not be longer than 200 characters.
VALIDATION.SHORT_DESCRIPTION_NO_QUOTES: Short description must not contain quotation marks.
VALIDATION.DESCRIPTION_MAX: Project description must not be longer than 500 characters.
VALIDATION.DESCRIPTION_NO_QUOTES: Project description must not contain quotation marks.
VALIDATION.PROJECT_URL_MIN: Project URL must be at least 3 characters long.
VALIDATION.PROJECT_URL_MAX: Project URL must not be longer than 30 characters.
VALIDATION.PROJECT_URL_FORMAT: Use only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens. Hyphens are not allowed at the beginning or end.

SEARCH.TITLE: Search
SEARCH.SUBTITLE: Find projects and users across the platform
SEARCH.NO_RESULTS_DESCRIPTION: No matching results were found. Please check the spelling or try different search terms.
SEARCH.ERROR_FAILED: The search failed. Please try again.

IMPRESSUM.TITLE: Legal notice
IMPRESSUM.SUBTITLE: Information according to Section 5 TMG
IMPRESSUM.RESPONSIBLE_VALUE:
The IdeaCamp development team
University of Applied Sciences Mittelhessen
Wiesenstraße 14, 35390 Giessen, Germany
IMPRESSUM.DISCLAIMER_TEXT: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.
IMPRESSUM.PRIVACY_TEXT: Since IdeaCamp is a student university project without commercial orientation, no personal data is permanently stored or shared with third parties. If you have any questions, please contact us directly by email.
IMPRESSUM.UNIVERSITY_PROJECT_TEXT: IdeaCamp is a student project as part of a university course project at THM. It is not a commercial offering.

PRIVACY.SUBTITLE: Control project visibility and joining
PRIVACY.PUBLIC_VISIBLE_DESCRIPTION: This project is publicly visible and can be found by anyone.
PRIVACY.PRIVATE_VISIBLE_DESCRIPTION: This project is private and does not appear in search.
PRIVACY.ALLOW_JOIN_REQUESTS_DESCRIPTION: Users can request to join the project. Project owners can accept or decline requests.

MEMBERS.SUBTITLE: Manage which members have access to the project.
MEMBERS.EMPTY: This project does not have any members yet.
MEMBERS.REMOVE_ACCESS: Access to the project will be removed
MEMBERS.REMOVE_CONFIRM_START: Are you sure you want to remove
MEMBERS.REMOVE_CONFIRM_END: This member will lose all permissions for the project!
MEMBERS.ERROR_DELETE_MEMBER: Member could not be deleted. Please try again shortly.
MEMBERS.ERROR_LOAD_MEMBERS: Members could not be loaded. Please try again later.
MEMBERS.ERROR_INVITE: Invitation could not be created. Please try again.
MEMBERS.INVITE_SUCCESS: Invitation was successfully sent to {{ username }}.

JOIN_REQUESTS.SUBTITLE: Manage join requests for this project.
JOIN_REQUESTS.EMPTY_DESCRIPTION: Once someone submits a request, it will appear here.

DANGER.TITLE: Delete project
DANGER.SUBTITLE: This action cannot be undone.
DANGER.DESCRIPTION: This project and all related data will be permanently deleted!
DANGER.DELETE_TEXT_END: all ideas, members and settings will be deleted. The data cannot be restored.
DANGER.CONFIRM_TYPE_START: To confirm this action, please type

ERRORS.LOAD_PROJECT: Project data could not be loaded.

TAGS.ERROR_INVALID_CHARS: Tag contains invalid characters. Allowed: letters, numbers, spaces, hyphen and dot.
TAGS.ERROR_DUPLICATE: Tag is already included in this project.

FILES.TITLE: Files
FILES.ERROR_TYPE_NOT_ALLOWED: File type not allowed. Allowed: PDF, PNG, JPG, DOCX, TXT, MD
FILES.ERROR_FILE_TOO_LARGE: File is too large. Maximum file size: 10 MB.

PROJECTPOSTS.SUBTITLE: News and updates for this project.
PROJECTPOSTS.EMPTY: There are no posts for this project yet.

ERRORS.EMPTY_FIELDS: Title and content must not be empty.

PROJECTPOSTS.MARKDOWN_HINT: You can use Markdown, e.g. headings, lists, links and emphasis.

CONTACT.TITLE: Contact
CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: If you have any questions or concerns, feel free to contact us.

PROFESSOR_REQUEST.PENDING_DESCRIPTION: Your request is being processed. You will receive a response once a decision has been made.
PROFESSOR_REQUEST.ACCEPTED_DESCRIPTION: Your request has been approved. You now have access to all advanced features.
PROFESSOR_REQUEST.REJECTED_DESCRIPTION: Your request was unfortunately rejected. You can submit a new request at any time.
PROFESSOR_REQUEST.CARD_DESCRIPTION: Advanced features for theses, research and student contact.
PROFESSOR_REQUEST.FEATURE_THESIS_DESC: Create topics for bachelor's and master's theses.
PROFESSOR_REQUEST.FEATURE_RESEARCH_DESC: Share research focuses for suitable projects.
PROFESSOR_REQUEST.FEATURE_STUDENTS_DESC: Make contact and accompany final projects.
PROFESSOR_REQUEST.FORM_DESCRIPTION: Briefly describe why you need professor rights.
PROFESSOR_REQUEST.SUCCESS_DESCRIPTION: Your request was successfully submitted. We will get back to you.
PROFESSOR_REQUEST.ERROR_SEND: Your request could not be sent. Please try again later.

VALIDATION.EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address.
